original_image_tags: A typed "Office Memorandum · UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT" form (Standard Form No. 64). The paper is aged and yellowed with torn edges, particularly at the top. It has two hole-punch marks at the top. The form contains typed text regarding a "Flying Disc Sighted" report. There are multiple handwritten annotations in blue and black ink, circled numbers, and several stamped marks including "RECORDED INDEXED", a case number "62-83 894", and date stamps "OCT. 1 1947" and "50 OCT 14 1947".

elements.description: A typed U.S. government office memorandum dated September 13, 1947, from SAC Seattle to the FBI Director regarding a 'Flying Disc Sighted' near Canyon Ferry, Montana. The page contains typed text, handwritten annotations, and official stamps.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (an aged typed memorandum with handwritten annotations and official stamps), but Description A provides more specific details about the stamps and markings that Description B omits without contradiction.
